rationale: The citation is not just a background list item: beyond the static-games literature review, the authors explicitly state they "followed Vitorino (2012)" for an equilibrium-related assumption in their estimation strategy. This indicates direct methodological use in setting up and justifying their discrete game framework. Although Vitorino is cited alongside other game-estimation papers, it still plays a meaningful role in how the citing paper operationalizes its model.
relation_description: The citing paper applies Vitorino (2012) as a methodological reference for modeling strategic interaction with a static discrete game in a new empirical domain (airline service reliability). It also adopts Vitorino's equilibrium-stability assumption to address multiple-equilibria concerns in estimation.
